scenario: Agentic AI agent maps the NovaMind attack surface: scanner-tool User-Agents probing sensitive files (/.env, /.git/HEAD) and forced-browse API recon (/api/v1/admin, /api/v1/training-data).

rules.name: NovaMind-CTF-Box1-ScannerRecon
rules.data_source: Cloudflare — HTTP Requests + Firewall Events (OCSF HTTP Activity, class_uid=4002)
rules.primary_signal: A single request whose User-Agent is a known scanner/offensive tool OR whose path is a known sensitive-file / forced-browse endpoint.

hunt_query.powerquery: dataSource.name='Cloudflare' class_uid=4002 (http_request.user_agent matches '(?i)(nikto|sqlmap|nuclei|masscan|wpscan|dirsearch|dirbuster|gobuster|feroxbuster|libwww-perl|autogpt|python-requests)' OR http_request.url.path in ('/.env','/.env.production','/.env.local','/.git/HEAD','/.git/config','/.aws/credentials','/config.json','/secrets.json','/.DS_Store','/api/v1/admin','/actuator/env','/phpmyadmin','/wp-login.php')) | group hits=count(), paths=estimate_distinct(http_request.url.path), last_seen=newest(timestamp) by src_endpoint.ip, http_request.user_agent | sort -hits | limit 100
hunt_query.note: Run via powerquery_run over 24h first. Expect rows only when the CTF Box 1 phase has fired. Row count = distinct (src_ip, UA) recon pairs.
hunt_query.row_counts: TO-RUN on live tenant — author-only, no execution performed.

data.name: NovaMind-CTF-Box1-ScannerRecon
data.description: Single recon request to NovaMind: known scanner User-Agent or probe of a sensitive file / forced-browse endpoint. MITRE T1595.002 / T1083 / T1190; ATLAS AML.T0035. Source: Cloudflare HTTP/Firewall (class_uid=4002).
data.s1ql: dataSource.name = 'Cloudflare' AND class_uid = 4002 AND (http_request.user_agent matches '(?i)(nikto|sqlmap|nuclei|masscan|wpscan|dirsearch|dirbuster|gobuster|feroxbuster|libwww-perl|autogpt|python-requests)' OR http_request.url.path in ('/.env','/.env.production','/.env.local','/.git/HEAD','/.git/config','/.aws/credentials','/config.json','/secrets.json','/.DS_Store','/api/v1/admin','/actuator/env','/phpmyadmin','/wp-login.php'))

rules.asset_binding: Auto-binds from the matched event ONLY if Cloudflare events carry device.uid (console agent id or unified asset id) + an endpoint class_uid via the asset-enrichment solution. Until enrichment runs, Target Asset = 'Unknown Device'; entity is src_endpoint.ip. Rule logic fires regardless.
rules.deploy: POST /web/api/v2.1/cloud-detection/rules with api_body -> PUT /cloud-detection/rules/enable {"filter":{"ids":["<id>"]}} -> poll GET ?ids=<id>&isLegacy=false until status==Active. Backslashes already JSON-double-escaped in s1ql regex.
rules.tuning: Medium severity by design — recon is high-volume and low-confidence on its own. Real value is as the FIRST sub-query of the Box 4 correlation (chain pivot). Consider an inline allowlist of legitimate scanners: AND NOT (src_endpoint.ip in ('<known-scanner-ip>')).

rules.name: NovaMind-CTF-Box1-ReconSweep-Fanout
rules.primary_signal: One src_endpoint.ip touching many DISTINCT recon/sensitive paths in the window (path fan-out) — a sweep, not a single probe.

ocsf_fields.ja4_fingerprint_list[0].value: mapped — carried to enable Box-2/Box-4 chain pivot

hunt_query.powerquery: dataSource.name='Cloudflare' class_uid=4002 http_request.url.path=* | filter http_request.url.path in ('/.env','/.env.production','/.env.local','/.git/HEAD','/.git/config','/.aws/credentials','/config.json','/secrets.json','/.DS_Store','/api/v1/admin','/api/v1/users','/api/v1/training-data','/api/v1/models','/actuator','/actuator/env','/actuator/health','/console','/phpmyadmin','/wp-admin','/wp-login.php','/admin','/admin/login','/admin/config','/dashboard','/openapi.json','/swagger.json','/swagger-ui.html','/v1/api-docs') | group distinct_paths=estimate_distinct(http_request.url.path), hits=count(), first_seen=oldest(timestamp), last_seen=newest(timestamp), ua=any(http_request.user_agent), ja4=any(ja4_fingerprint_list[0].value) by src_ip=src_endpoint.ip | filter distinct_paths >= 8 | columns src_ip, distinct_paths, hits, ua, ja4, first_seen, last_seen | sort -distinct_paths | limit 100
hunt_query.note: distinct_paths >= 8 is the sweep threshold (RECON_PATHS has ~40 entries; a benign client hits 1-2). Walk down to confirm a row exists during the CTF run, then keep above benign baseline.

data.name: NovaMind-CTF-Box1-ReconSweep-Fanout
data.description: One source IP probing >=8 distinct sensitive/recon paths on NovaMind in the window (recon sweep / forced-browse fan-out). MITRE T1595.002 / T1046; ATLAS AML.T0035. Source: Cloudflare class_uid=4002.

scheduledParams.query: dataSource.name='Cloudflare' class_uid=4002 http_request.url.path=* | filter http_request.url.path in ('/.env','/.env.production','/.env.local','/.git/HEAD','/.git/config','/.aws/credentials','/config.json','/secrets.json','/.DS_Store','/api/v1/admin','/api/v1/users','/api/v1/training-data','/api/v1/models','/actuator','/actuator/env','/actuator/health','/console','/phpmyadmin','/wp-admin','/wp-login.php','/admin','/admin/login','/admin/config','/dashboard','/openapi.json','/swagger.json','/swagger-ui.html','/v1/api-docs') | group distinct_paths=estimate_distinct(http_request.url.path), hits=count(), first_seen=oldest(timestamp), last_seen=newest(timestamp), ua=any(http_request.user_agent), ja4=any(ja4_fingerprint_list[0].value) by src_ip=src_endpoint.ip | filter distinct_paths >= 8 | columns src_ip, distinct_paths, hits, ua, ja4, first_seen, last_seen | sort -distinct_paths | limit 100

rules.asset_binding: Scheduled rule: entityMappings on src_ip (= src_endpoint.ip). Until asset enrichment projects device_host/device_agentuuid, the entity is the source IP (sufficient for the HA block-IP playbook); device shows 'Unknown Device'.
rules.deploy: POST -> enable -> poll. Scheduled rule: treatAsThreat=UNDEFINED, networkQuarantine=false required. Wait one full 15-min interval after Active before judging. List with isLegacy=false.
